On Wed, Feb 11, 2026 at 5:22 PM Bhan, Shivata <dshivata@amazon.com> wrote:
Dear Shipper,

Congratulations! Your Amazon Shipping account has been successfully activated.
I noticed you've completed your registration but haven't created your first shipment yet. We're excited to help you get started and want to make sure you have everything you need.
Why ship with Amazon Shipping?
✓ Reliable delivery across 14,000+ pin codes – Reach customers anywhere in India with consistent, on-time delivery
✓ 97% success rate on prepaid deliveries – Proven performance that improves customer satisfaction and repeat purchases
✓ Fast COD disbursements – Better cash flow management for your growing business
Ready to create your first shipment? Log in to your account here: https://ship.amazon.in/
If you need any assistance with creating your first shipment or have questions about our platform, I'm here to help. You can reach me directly at [your email] or contact our support team at amazon-shipping-queries@amazon.com.
We're ready to support your shipping needs!
 
Best,
Shivata Bhan
Transportation Specialist
E: dshivata@amazon.com

Request #373998 "Welcome to Shopify Partner Plugi..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #373998:

Hello My,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on bstg77-ma.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hi Team,

Please enable:


1. Display item QTY on the label.
2. Update the Tax invoice format to Love of India Tax invoice format
3. Would it be possible to add "box name" on tax invoice or "pick-list"?


(Abhilash)

Please enable: 
 
  1. Display item QTY on the label.
  2. Update the Tax invoice format to Love of India Tax invoice format

comments.body:
Need assistance from L3 team on the following cases

Case:
1-> Enable 'Display Item Quantity On the Amazon Label' toggle feature
2->Box name on tax invoice or pick-list

FYI, we do have "shipping.boxName" key to display box name on packing slip, but not working for tax invoice. Customers want the box name on either the tax invoice or the pick-list

Could you please check and provide your input?

Store Details:
Store URL - bstg77-ma.myshopify.com
Account ID - f05fb570-fa05-4910-9974-cd81c171bbb8

Request #374160 "Give Multi Carrier Shipping Labe..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #374160:

Hello My,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from bstg77-ma.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team
comments.html_body:
Request #374160 "Give Multi Carrier Shipping Labe..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #374160:

Hello My,

We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - “PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App” from bstg77-ma.myshopify.com

If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.

Did you know?

  • Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more.
  • This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s).
  • Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click.
  • Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support.

Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

We would like to hear from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - “PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App” from bstg77-ma.myshopify.com 
 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period. 
 
 Did you know? 
 
 Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more. 
 This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s). 
 Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click. 
 Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support. 
 
 
 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements. 
 We would like to hear from you. 
 Thanks and Regards,

 Team PluginHive

https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Call Summary:

Customer is finding the app not user-friendly. He is specially not able to configure the Box Packing and due to this app is packing multiple quantities separately and when he manually removes additional packages from the order, the order is partially fulfilled from the app. Also, the Tax Invoice is generating on more than 1 page which he is not able to adjust to a single page.
Tried convincing him that this a setup issue, and we can assist in this, but customer did not want to continue.

comments.body:
- **Display QTY on Label** – This is not working. The quantity is not appearing on the label even after enabling the feature.
- **Tax Invoice Printing on Multiple Pages** – The tax invoice is being generated across multiple pages instead of a single page. This needs to be reviewed.
- **Display Box Name on Pick List or Tax Invoice** –  Customer is requesting if we can display the box name on the pick-list  or tax invoice.
- **Logo Compression on Tax Invoice** – The logo appears compressed on the tax invoice printout. We need to expand a bit.
- **400 Labels on $19 Plan** – This has been approved by Vimal. Please proceed with enabling 400 labels under the $19 plan for this account.


(Abhilash)

comments.body:
Hello Ashish & Team,

Good day!

Thank you for your time and patience while we reviewed this case internally.

I’m pleased to inform you that we have activated the feature to display item quantity on Amazon shipping labels. This change will automatically reflect on all newly generated labels.

We have also adjusted the logo on the packing slip, and it is now printing correctly. Please review it at your convenience.

Additionally, we have increased the label limit under the $19 Starter plan. You should now be able to print up to 400 labels.

Regarding your queries about printing the tax invoice on multiple pages and displaying the box name on the pick list or tax invoice, we are actively working on these enhancements. They will be included in an upcoming release. We will share an update with you once it is available.

Please feel free to reach out anytime if you need further assistance from our end.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ashish & Team,
 
Good day!
 
Thank you for your time and patience while we reviewed this case internally.
 
I’m pleased to inform you that we have activated the feature to display item quantity on Amazon shipping labels. This change will automatically reflect on all newly generated labels.
 
We have also adjusted the logo on the packing slip, and it is now printing correctly. Please review it at your convenience.
 
Additionally, we have increased the label limit under the $19 Starter plan. You should now be able to print up to 400 labels.
 
Regarding your queries about printing the tax invoice on multiple pages and displaying the box name on the pick list or tax invoice, we are actively working on these enhancements. They will be included in an upcoming release. We will share an update with you once it is available.
 
Please feel free to reach out anytime if you need further assistance from our end.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
